channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The Double Standard of Guilt by Association
item.description: Prominent figures have faced consequences for ties to Epstein, while Democratic candidates' past associations seem off-limits.

item.title: The Myth of Oligarchy
item.description: Billionaires do not hold the political influence that Bernie Sanders and his allies claim.

item.title: A Look Inside Obama's Presidential Center
item.description: Setting aside the figures it celebrates, the architecture is quite decent.

item.title: The American Bar Association Is Unfit to Accredit Law Schools, and the Trump Admin Can Stop Them
item.description: Some states have broken away from the ABA, but federal recognition of its accreditation power gives it a monopoly over U.S. legal education.
